SearchCount.title: SearchCount
SearchCount.description: Tracks the number of times a city has been searched.

city.description: The name of the city (e.g., 'Tokyo, Japan').

count.description: The number of times this city has been searched.

lastSearched.description: The last time this city was searched.

ReliefLocation.title: ReliefLocation
ReliefLocation.description: A public toilet or friendly business location.

/searches/{cityId}.description: Collection of search counts for cities.

/relief_locations/{locationId}.description: Collection of public toilets and friendly businesses.
